Prof. Dr. Ekrem Kadri UNAT Multidisciplinary Laboratory is a laboratory that enables students in the fields of Biophysics, Physiology, Medical Biology and Genetics, Medical Biochemistry and Medical Microbiology to transform their theoretical knowledge into practice. Faculty of Medicine students can apply the knowledge they have learned in these courses in Prof. Dr. Ekrem Kadri UNAT Multidisciplinary Laboratory and make their theoretical knowledge permanent.

Prof. Dr. Ekrem Kadri UNAT Multidisciplinary Laboratory is used by the following departments.

Biophysics

Physiology

Medical Biology and Genetics

Medical Biochemistry

Medical Microbiology
